steps.title: Identify the Stated Goal
steps.content: The student's goal is explicitly stated: “specify the average length of the green iguana.” This single criterion determines which notes to use.

steps.title: Apply the Goal to Find the Match
steps.content: Choice B directly provides the average length (4.8 feet), fulfilling the goal. Choices A, C, and D provide other information from the notes—location, diet, or both—but none includes the length measurement needed. That matches choice B — B is correct.
